name: learn-while-coding
description: Learn engineering concepts while AI-assisted coding

scripts.build: npm run build --workspaces --if-present 2>/dev/null || (cd packages/core && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json && cd ../hook-runner && npx tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ../../scripts/build-hook-runner.mjs && cd ../../extension && npm run build)
